Hi MrBeast,

My name is Ace from the Philippines. I know you receive millions of messages, but I’m hoping somehow this one reaches you.

Last month my father passed away after a road accident. He was 62 years old and the main provider for our family. Losing him has been the hardest moment of our lives. Aside from the pain of losing him, we are now struggling to survive without his support.

Right now I work as a driver for 12–15 hours every day. But the car I drive is not mine. After paying the boundary and fuel, I only bring home about ₱1,000 a day. I keep pushing myself because my family depends on me.
My biggest dream is simple: to own a 7-seater vehicle so I can work as a TNVS driver with my own unit. Something like a Hyundai Stargazer X Premium would completely change our lives. Instead of paying boundary, every trip I drive would directly support my family.

I’m not asking for a luxury life. I just want the chance to work harder and build a stable future for the people who depend on me.

You’ve changed the lives of so many people around the world. If by any miracle you see this message, it would mean everything to my family.

Thank you for inspiring people like me to never give up.

God bless you.
